creator: M.Santhoff@t-online.de
text:
When trying to build a package from the port lang/python25 the tar process fails upon a missing file:

===>  Building package for python25-2.5.2_2
Creating package /usr/ports/packages/All/python25-2.5.2_2.tbz
Registering depends:.
Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/usr/ports/packages/All/python25-2.5.2_2.tbz'

tar: lib/python2.5/lib-dynload/_ctypes.so: Cannot stat: No such file or director
y

pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** Error code 1

Stop in /var/home/ports/lang/python25.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /var/home/ports/lang/python25.

How-To-Repeat: (get an arm9 board, ARM920T - or ask me if I can provide access)
cd /usr/ports/lang/python25
make package
